import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import numpy as np

def task_func(dataframe, target_value='332'):
    # Create a new DataFrame with Boolean values
    bool_df = dataframe.eq(target_value).astype(int)

    # Prepare the DataFrame for heatmap visualization
    heatmap_data = np.flipud(bool_df.values)
    heatmap_x, heatmap_y = bool_df.shape

    # Create a new figure with subplots
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 10))

    # Set the color map and other aesthetic properties for the heatmap
    sns.heatmap(
        data=heatmap_data,
        xticklabels=heatmap_x,
        yticklabels=heatmap_y,
        cmap='viridis',
        center=0,
        square=True,
        linewidths=.5,
        cbar_kws={"shrink": .8}
    )

    # Set the title and labels for the heatmap
    ax.set_title("Occurrences of '{}' in DataFrame".format(target_value), fontsize=16)
    ax.set_xlabel('Columns', fontsize=12)
    ax.set_ylabel('Rows', fontsize=12)

    # Return the Boolean DataFrame and the Axes object of the heatmap
    return bool_df, ax
